CreateLifecyclePolicy.name: CreateLifecyclePolicy
CreateLifecyclePolicy.description: Grants permission to create a data lifecycle policy to manage the scheduled creation and retention of Amazon EBS snapshots. You may have up to 100 policies

DeleteLifecyclePolicy.name: DeleteLifecyclePolicy
DeleteLifecyclePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete an existing data lifecycle policy. In addition, this action halts the creation and deletion of snapshots that the policy specified. Existing snapshots are not affected

GetLifecyclePolicies.name: GetLifecyclePolicies
GetLifecyclePolicies.description: Grants permission to returns a list of summary descriptions of data lifecycle policies

GetLifecyclePolicy.name: GetLifecyclePolicy
GetLifecyclePolicy.description: Grants permission to return a complete description of a single data lifecycle policy

ListTagsForResource.name: ListTagsForResource
ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags associated with a resource

TagResource.name: TagResource
TagResource.description: Grants permission to add or update tags of a resource

UntagResource.name: UntagResource
UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags associated with a resource

UpdateLifecyclePolicy.name: UpdateLifecyclePolicy
UpdateLifecyclePolicy.description: Grants permission to update an existing data lifecycle policy

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}
aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}
aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.name: aws:TagKeys
aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
